summary: Record the exact-main ADR 0324 closeout from the latest realistic origin/main tip 4bb9c2fd7c8a3296e33a8dc7e77ee06bd5adf0a4, refresh canonical truth to point at the mainline service-definition-catalog receipt, repair the missing generated SLO target artifact surfaced by the fresh mainline repo gates, reconcile the upstream VERSION 0.178.140 versus stack repo_version 0.178.139 drift, and carry the already-live-applied service-catalog assembly into the current mainline repo version 0.178.140.

verification.observed: The exact-main integration tree preserves a valid ADR 0324 bundle source and generated catalog assembly contract.
The focused pytest slice covering service-definition bundles, Windmill follow-through, docker bridge chains, firewall guards, and PostgreSQL access policy passed on the integrated main tree.

The fresh exact-main validation replay reproduced a current-main gap rather than a ws-0324 regression: config/prometheus/file_sd/slo_targets.yml was missing and had to be regenerated before the repository data-model gate could pass again.

notes: The earlier branch receipt 2026-04-04-adr-0324-service-definition-catalog-assembly-live-apply remains the first-live proof for ADR 0324 on platform version 0.130.98.

This mainline receipt records the exact-main closeout from origin/main@4bb9c2fd7c8a3296e33a8dc7e77ee06bd5adf0a4 and captures the final 0.178.140 targeted validation evidence set from commit daeeeb96bf7fc7acdd736b772250ed9162c1c9e9.

The clean latest-main verification workspace at the same origin/main tip is already red in the broader promotion gate on generated-docs, ansible-lint, and integration-tests, so those failures remain inherited mainline debt rather than new ADR 0324 regressions.
A fresh numbered release cut is intentionally deferred because the repository's release blocker policy still sees unrelated in-progress workstreams on latest main.
